widgets.name: Trust Graph Visualizer
widgets.description: Interactive cryptographic mandate chain visualization. Inspect agent-signed transaction links and trace the full trust path.

widgets.name: Risk Intelligence Dashboard
widgets.description: Explainable risk scoring output. View composite risk scores, triggered factors, and AI recommendations.

widgets.name: Mandate Verifier
widgets.description: Cryptographic Ed25519 signature verification for payment mandates. Shows real-time pass/fail with tamper detection.

mandateType.description: Type of mandate: intent, cart, or payment

signerPublicKeyId.description: Public key ID of the signer

widgets.name: Kill Switch Panel
widgets.description: RBI MRM 2026-compliant human-in-the-loop override panel. Instantly suspend or resume agents, mandates, or transactions.

targetType.description: Target type: agent, mandate, or transaction

targetId.description: ID of the target to act on

widgets.name: Live Market Context
widgets.description: Live NSE BFSI sector snapshot. Macro risk enrichment signals used by the risk engine to calibrate transaction thresholds.

symbols.description: Optional list of NSE symbols to fetch
